---
title: "999_functions"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-05-31"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
min_genes  <- 200
max_genes  <- 6000
max_mt_pct <- 5

process_one <- function(dir, sample_id) {
  counts <- Read10X(dir)
  obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts, project = sample_id,
                            min.cells = 3, min.features = min_genes)
  obj$sample    <- sample_id
  obj$ancestry  <- str_extract(sample_id, "^[A-Z]{2}")
  obj$fetal_sex <- str_match(sample_id, "^[A-Z]{2}_([FM])")[,2]
  obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^MT-")

  obj <- subset(obj, subset = nFeature_RNA >= min_genes &
                              nFeature_RNA <= max_genes &
                              percent.mt   <= max_mt_pct)

  sce <- scDblFinder(GetAssayData(obj, layer = "counts"))
  obj$scDblFinder.class <- sce$scDblFinder.class
  obj <- subset(obj, subset = scDblFinder.class == "singlet")

  message(sprintf("%s: %d cells after QC", sample_id, ncol(obj)))
  rm(counts, sce); gc()
  obj
}

obj_list <- imap(sample_dirs, process_one)
```
